'''Whee Tillatch''' was a [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkora]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a member of the criminal syndicate [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Having attained the rank of [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]], Tillatch and the rest of the Black Sun leadership were brutally slaughtered during an [[Mission to Ralltiir|attack]] by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkora]], Whee Tillatch became involved in the criminal organization [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], eventually rising through the ranks and attaining the title [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]], making him one of the nine [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the syndicate. To protect him, Tillatch employed bodyguards to ensure his safety, escorted by personal guards at all time.<ref name="DM3" />

In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], the vigos of Black Sun unknowingly became the targets of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and his [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]]. Due to time restraints, the Sith would not be able to hunt down the vigos separately and kill them; instead the Sith would need to lure them together so they could die at once. Ordering his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] to hunt down two vigos at first, Sidious anticipated Black Sun leader [[Alexi Garyn]] to order the survivors to a single location.<ref name="Darth Plagueis novel">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

Indeed, after the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] assassin had killed Vigos [[Morn]] and [[Darnada]] Garyn summoned the remaining vigos, including Tillatch, to his [[Black Sun Fortress|fortress]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. When the vigos had all gathered, Darth Maul infiltrated the fortress and slaughtered all the guards before making his way into the central chamber the vigos had congregated in. One by one Maul cut down the guards before [[Mission to Ralltiir|executing]] the vigos. During the fighting, Maul murdered Tillatch with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="DM4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tillatch's appearance was based on unused concept art from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="Alien species concepts that became part of the SW universe">{{Blog|teekay-421|69|Alien species concepts that became part of the SW universe}}</ref>

Tillatch's species has been debated since his appearance. However, artist [[Jan Duursema]] has revealed that "Whee Tillatch is meant to be Yakora [sic]" when asked if he was a Yarkora.<ref name="JCF" />
